description_long: This is a luxurious, deep burgundy leather armchair with a classic Chesterfield design, featuring prominent button-tufted upholstery on the backrest, arms, and front panel. The armrests are wide, rolled, and heavily padded, adorned with brass nailhead trim along the front edges for a sophisticated accent. The seat cushion is thick and plush, providing ample comfort, and is bordered by the same leather material as the rest of the chair. The backrest is high and rounded, seamlessly integrated with the armrests, and also displays the signature tufted pattern. The chair sits on short, rounded wooden feet that are barely visible beneath the base. This armchair exudes an air of elegance and comfort, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A deep burgundy, button-tufted leather Chesterfield armchair with rolled arms, brass nailhead trim, and a plush seat cushion. The design is classic and luxurious, ideal for sophisticated urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rolled arms, deep seat cushion, and button-tufted backrest with brass nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the continuous tufted leather upholstery.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, fully upholstered backrest with tufted detailing and no visible seams.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's padding and the smooth, uninterrupted leather surface.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, rolled, padded and upholstered in tufted leather with brass nailhead trim
